symbols.vision_description: A circular hand-drawn illustration containing a central tree-like or pillar structure, small human/figurine symbols, circular medallions with crosses, and various dots and small marks, resembling an ancient petroglyph or esoteric diagram.

Hand-drawn shape resembling a shield or banner with a curved/rounded bottom, a flat top crossed by two horizontal lines, and a small open circle (ring) positioned in the upper-right portion of the body.

A quarter-circle (pie-slice shape) outlined with double lines, containing three small circles each with a central dot, arranged in a triangular pattern. The overall figure resembles a hand-drawn diagram, possibly from a historical printed page.
A heraldic shield (escutcheon) shape containing three small circles (roundels) arranged in a 2-over-1 triangular pattern
Hand-drawn quarter-circle or pizza-slice shape containing three small circles inside, resembling toppings on a slice
A simple hand-drawn outline of a human figure with a rounded head, broad shoulders, and torso, rendered in rough black strokes.

A simple line drawing of a person/figure with a rounded head containing two dot eyes and a vertical line mouth, and a body with multiple vertical parallel lines suggesting a striped robe or garment, with small rectangular feet at the bottom.

Three to four roughly parallel horizontal hand-drawn bars stacked vertically, with short vertical stroke segments on the left side connecting them, resembling a simplified ladder or stylized character with horizontal emphasis.
Tall narrow glyph showing several vertical parallel black bars of varying thickness contained within a rectangular frame, resembling a barred gate, fence, or barcode-like pattern.
Four tall, thin vertical parallel lines/strokes of roughly equal width, with slight serifs or horizontal caps at the top and bottom, resembling a bundle of rods or tally-like marks.

Chinese character 門 (gate/door) rendered in seal script style, featuring a horizontal bar at the top connecting to multiple vertical strokes descending to a bottom horizontal bar, forming a gate-like structure.
Multiple horizontal parallel lines forming a bracket or staff-like structure, with a partial circle visible at the top and a vertical line on the right edge.
A series of horizontal parallel lines intersected by a vertical line on the left, forming a ladder-like or staff ruling pattern with a bracket-like right edge.
Three horizontal parallel lines connected on the left side by a short vertical line, forming a shape like a right-facing bracket or stylized 'E' without the top stroke.
Four to five parallel horizontal bars or rods stacked vertically with even spacing, resembling a ladder rung section or a wooden fence/grill pattern in black and white.
Archaic seal-style character resembling a rectangular enclosure with an internal vertical stroke on the right, possibly the character 由

Fragmentary crop showing vertical parallel lines/strokes with curved elements at the top and small rectangular shapes at the bottom, resembling part of a larger illustration or character that has been cut off.
A stick figure with arms raised upward, featuring a round head, straight torso, and legs spread apart, with horizontal lines on either side suggesting a table or platform.
A simple stick figure drawing showing a head (small circle) at the top, a vertical body line, and two arms extending outward and downward.
Two Greek capital letter Pi (Π) symbols side by side, each consisting of a horizontal top bar with two descending vertical strokes, joined by a shared horizontal baseline at the bottom.

A circular border containing a stylized figure resembling a small tree or human-like stick figure with branching arms/limbs and a vertical stem, rendered in black ink on a light background, appearing as a woodcut or early printed illustration.

An archaic Chinese character in seal script style, appearing to be 來 (lái, 'to come') with characteristic flowing, curving strokes and a roughly rectangular outer enclosure containing inner stroke elements.

Thick black horizontal bars at top and bottom connected by multiple vertical strokes, forming a series of rectangular cells — characteristic of seal script character 冊 (cè, 'book/volume') or similar grid-structured character.
A rectangular seal-script style glyph with two horizontal bars (top and bottom) connected by three vertical strokes, resembling an ancient Chinese character in seal script form.

A Chinese character resembling 瓜 (gourd) or similar character with multiple vertical strokes enclosed within a rectangular frame, with additional marks at the top. Appears in a stylized, possibly seal or archaic script form.
Two vertical bars connected at the top and bottom by horizontal lines, resembling the Greek letter Pi (π) with a closed bottom, or a rectangular frame with two interior vertical posts.
A single hand-drawn or rough circular outline, slightly irregular in shape, with no markings or contents inside.
Two adjacent tall rectangular frames with thick black borders, resembling windows or door panels side by side.
Hand-drawn rectangular frame outline with an internal vertical stroke and crossing horizontal/diagonal lines, resembling a boxed bracket or enclosure with interior divisions.
A seal-script style character with a horizontal top bar, vertical strokes descending, and internal cross-strokes, possibly representing a character like 亞 or similar architectural/box-shaped glyph
A simple hand-drawn or rough circular outline with no interior marks
A hand-drawn, slightly irregular circle outlined with a thick black stroke on a white background.
Hand-drawn rough circle with a small dot in the center
Hand-drawn plain circle outline with no internal markings or dots
A simple hollow circle drawn with a black outline, slightly irregular in shape, with no interior markings.
Hand-drawn circular ring with a small dot in the center, resembling a sun or eye symbol
Stylized seal-script-like glyph with a vertical stroke on the left, horizontal crossbars, and a diagonal element on the lower right, resembling a degraded form of 丙 or a similar character.

Complex Chinese character in seal script style with multiple intersecting vertical strokes and curved crossing elements forming an intricate pattern, possibly a character like 森 or 棘 rendered in ancient seal form.
A figure-like shape enclosed within a rectangular frame, resembling an early Chinese character depicting a person trapped inside a box.
A circle containing a cross (plus sign) that divides it into four quadrants, with hatched/textured shading on the right side, resembling a wheel.

A bold, angular runic character resembling a stylized 'N' with thick vertical strokes on both sides connected by diagonal lines crossing in the middle, drawn in heavy black ink with a hand-carved appearance typical of Old Turkic script.

Seal script character showing a large curved enclosure (resembling 囗) on the right with internal crosshatch/grid strokes forming a 田-like pattern on the left side. The strokes are thick and brush-like, characteristic of stamped seal script.
A character with vertical strokes and angular/curved elements resembling an ancient Chinese seal script glyph, with thick black strokes on white background
A rough-edged circle with a cross (plus sign) dividing it into four quadrants, appearing like an ink-stamped or hand-drawn wheel symbol with irregular outer contour.
A roughly drawn circle containing a cross or plus-sign pattern inside, with additional curved internal lines suggesting a wheel-like or spoked design, rendered in thick black strokes.

A Chinese seal script character featuring a rounded top with a small central bump and two vertical strokes descending below, connected by a horizontal stroke, resembling characters like 申 or 由 in seal script form.
A dark circular outline with internal vertical and horizontal lines dividing the interior into quadrants, resembling a gridded or windowed circle.
Capital letter H in serif style with additional curved stroke marks on the left side, resembling an ornate or hand-drawn initial.
A blackletter or gothic-style capital letter, appears to be 'P' or 'D' with a vertical stem on the left and a rounded bowl on the upper right portion.
Complex character with two prominent vertical strokes and crossing horizontal/diagonal lines in the middle, rendered in an ancient seal or oracle script style with thick brush strokes.
A hand-drawn horizontal bar with several short vertical posts/lines extending upward from it, and a vertical line on the right side, resembling a simple sketch of a fence or railing fragment.
A grid pattern of thick black intersecting horizontal and vertical lines forming a 3x3 array of squares.

A 3x3 grid pattern formed by two thick vertical and two thick horizontal black bars on a white background, resembling a window pane or hash/pound grid. It visually corresponds to the Chinese character 井 (well).
A grid pattern of thick black lines forming a 3x3 arrangement of white rectangular panes, resembling a window or waffle-like texture.
A 3x3 grid of white squares outlined with thick black lines, resembling a tic-tac-toe board or part of a sudoku grid.
A 3x3 grid pattern of white squares separated by thick black lines, resembling a mesh or lattice structure.
A grid pattern of dark intersecting horizontal and vertical lines forming a 3x3 arrangement of roughly square cells, resembling a window pane or lattice.
